decks.notes: This deck focuses on combining aggressive creatures with disruptive spells to control the pace of the game. By utilizing efficient removal like Swords to Plowshares and Thoughtseize, along with powerful creatures such as Skyclave Apparition and Stoneforge Mystic, the deck aims to apply pressure on the opponent while disrupting their strategy. With Yorion, Sky Nomad as a companion, the deck also has access to a powerful card advantage engine. Overall, the deck aims to outpace and outmaneuver opponents with a combination of aggression and disruption.

The deck focuses on controlling the opponent while maintaining a fast tempo with aggressive plays. It utilizes disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will to control the game early on, while also using powerful threats like Murktide Regent and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student to apply pressure. Wasteland and Daze help to disrupt the opponent's mana base and slow them down, allowing the deck to take control of the game and win with efficient attacks and powerful creatures. The deck aims to outpace the opponent and maintain dominance throughout the match.

This deck focuses on utilizing Umori, the Collector as a companion to build a cohesive aggro strategy. The deck includes a mix of creatures with synergy such as Broadside Bombardiers, Wight of the Reliquary, and Guide of Souls. The mana base is optimized with lands like Ancient Ziggurat and Gaea's Cradle to support the aggressive game plan. Additionally, the deck includes powerful cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury to apply pressure on the opponent and secure victory.

The main focus of this Legacy 1 vs 1 deck is to quickly and efficiently cheat powerful creatures like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier into play using cards like Sneak Attack and Show and Tell. By utilizing cards such as Brainstorm, Force of Will, and various counterspells, the deck aims to protect these creatures and establish a dominating board presence. The mana base is designed to support the combo strategy, ensuring quick access to the necessary colors of mana to cast key spells.

This deck focuses on using a combination of counter spells, removal spells, and card draw to control the game and out value the opponent. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Force of Will and Wasteland while generating card advantage through cards like Brainstorm and Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student. Murktide Regent and Uro, Titan of Nature's Wrath provide threats that can take over the game if left unchecked, while cards like Fatal Push and Orcish Bowmasters help to deal with the opponent's creatures. The deck aims to grind out the opponent and win through incremental advantage.

This Dimir Tempo deck aims to control the game by disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Thoughtseize and Force of Will while also applying pressure through efficient creatures like Brazen Borrower and Murktide Regent. The deck utilizes a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and creature threats to maintain tempo and outmaneuver the opponent. With a focus on disrupting and controlling the opponent's game plan while presenting a clock of threats, this deck seeks to win the game by staying one step ahead and dictating the pace of the game.

This deck focuses on using lands as both resources and win conditions, with a strong control element to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By leveraging cards like Thespian's Stage and Dark Depths to create a powerful 20/20 Marit Lage token, while also using cards like Mox Diamond and Exploration to ramp and disrupt the opponent's mana base, this deck aims to grind out wins through attrition and land-based synergies. Cards like Sphere of Resistance and The Tabernacle at Pendrell Vale help to slow down the opponent's game plan, while Life from the Loam provides a steady stream of land recursion and card advantage.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing lands to disrupt the opponent's strategy while ramping up its own resources. It utilizes cards like Dark Depths and Thespian's Stage to create powerful token creatures, while also using cards like Wasteland and Crop Rotation to disrupt the opponent's lands. The inclusion of Boseiju, Who Endures and Malevolent Rumble provides protection and removal options, while cards like Mox Diamond and Exploration help accelerate the deck's mana production. Overall, the deck aims to outgrind and outvalue the opponent through efficient land interactions.

The main idea of this deck is to use cards like Show and Tell, Omniscience, and Stock Up to cheat big threats like Emrakul, the Aeons Torn and Atraxa, Grand Unifier onto the battlefield quickly. The deck also includes disruption like Force of Will, Thoughtseize, and Fatal Push to control the opponent's plays while building up to its combo. Tamiyo, Inquisitive Student provides card advantage and selection, while Murktide Regent adds a powerful threat that can quickly close out the game. The deck aims to win through overwhelming the opponent with powerful threats and disruptive plays.

The key concept of this deck is to utilize artifacts and blue cards to quickly build a strong board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive tactics. By maximizing the use of cards like Mox Opal, Urza's Saga, and Emry, Lurker of the Loch, the deck aims to rapidly deploy threats while also disrupting the opponent with cards like Force of Will and Pithing Needle. The mana acceleration from cards like Lotus Petal and Ancient Tomb allows for explosive turns, while the inclusion of Aether Spellbomb and Sink into Stupor provide additional utility and disruption options.

The deck focuses on cheating powerful creatures like Griselbrand and Emrakul, the Aeons Torn into play using cards like Show and Tell and Sneak Attack. It also includes cards like Atraxa, Grand Unifier and Omniscience to further enhance its combo potential. With a mix of card draw and mana acceleration, the deck aims to quickly overwhelm the opponent with its big threats while also having interaction with counterspells like Force of Will and Flusterstorm for protection. The deck's main goal is to win the game as quickly as possible through its powerful combo plays.

The deck focuses on ramping up mana with cards like Gaea's Cradle and Green Sun's Zenith to quickly bring out powerful creatures like Craterhoof Behemoth. It also utilizes control elements such as Thoughtseize and Endurance to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient mana usage and big creatures, while also having some flexibility with cards like Once Upon a Time to find key pieces when needed. Overall, the deck is built around utilizing powerful creatures and control elements to dominate the game.

This deck focuses on generating mana and assembling a powerful combo using Mystic Forge and various artifacts like Urza's Workshop and Karn, the Great Creator. The goal is to quickly assemble the pieces needed to create a powerful board state, including using cards like Manifold Key and The One Ring to manipulate artifacts and combo off. With efficient mana acceleration and card draw engines, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a quick and unexpected win condition through a series of intricate interactions and combos.

The deck focuses on utilizing a combination of control spells and powerful creatures to disrupt the opponent's strategy while creating card advantage and steadily progressing towards victory. It includes disruptive spells like Force of Will and Swords to Plowshares, card draw/filtering with Ponder and Brainstorm, and powerful threats like Uro, Titan of Nature's Wrath and Murktide Regent. The mana base is carefully crafted to provide a variety of colors for the spells and creatures in the deck, ensuring flexibility and consistency in executing the control strategy.

The deck focuses on utilizing the Mystic Forge combo to generate massive card advantage and mana efficiency. By using cards like Urza's Saga, Karn, the Great Creator, and Tezzeret, Cruel Captain, the deck aims to control the board and set up a win condition with cards like The One Ring and Glaring Fleshraker. By assembling the right pieces, the deck can quickly generate a powerful board presence and overwhelm the opponent with its combo potential. Additionally, cards like Kozilek's Command and Portable Hole provide disruption to control the opponent's strategies.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's game plan while applying pressure with aggressive creatures and efficient removal spells. By combining disruptive spells like Thoughtseize and Force of Will with aggressive threats like Orcish Bowmasters and Murktide Regent, the deck aims to control the pace of the game and close out the match quickly. The inclusion of tempo plays like Daze and Brazen Borrower further adds to its ability to maintain control and disrupt the opponent's plans. Overall, the deck aims to outpace and overwhelm the opponent while keeping them off balance.
